title: Saturn Enters the Incident
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Saturn, Unknown person #6, Bonney, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sanji as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Bonney- Chan!! Don't just stand there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But if you can't accept that... you'll...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Pacific- TAS are already on our side.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, but I can't focus on my mission if I stay here...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
